title: Smoother Hotbar
description: This Texture Pack changes the Hotbar a little bit. Empty Amour and Empty Bubbels are gone and the Hotbar Slots are connected.
body:
This Texture Pack changes the Hotbar a little bit. Empty Amour and Empty Bubbels are gone and the Hotbar Slots are connected.

![Here is a Photo of the new Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3059091b75168667a69a1c99366b6b089a6ed0e0.png)
